══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Goblin — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Goblin — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Goblin — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Goblin — Unarmored Caster.
→ Goblin — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 20] FAIL! 38 necrotic damage. HP: 29/67
--- Goblin — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 29/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
